---
title: "Fangraphs Visualizations"
author: "jbl113"
date: "2026-03-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(baseballr)
library(knitr)
library(readr)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)
```

## Data Preparation
### Load the Dataset
```{r}
fangraphs <- read_csv("fangraphs.csv")
```




# TESTING
```{r}
pfx_usage_long <- fangraphs %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^pfx[A-Z]{2}%$"),
    names_to = "pitch_type",
    values_to = "usage_pct"
  ) %>%
  mutate(pitch_type = str_replace(pitch_type, "pfx([A-Z]{2})%", "\\1"))

player <- pfx_usage_long %>%
  filter(PlayerNameRoute=="Trevor May") %>%
  drop_na(usage_pct)

player %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Season, y=usage_pct, fill=pitch_type)) +
  geom_area()
```

```{r}
fangraphs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Season,y=`pfxST%`, color=xMLBAMID)) +
  geom_line(na.rm=TRUE)
```
